# CWE-179 positive: validation before URL decoding
lang: go
file: CWE-179-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"net/url"
	"regexp"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var safeToken = regexp.MustCompile(`^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$`)

// CWE-179 Incorrect Behavior Order: Early Validation
// Vulnerable line: validates encoded token, then QueryUnescape expands attacks.
func LoadToken(c *gin.Context) {
	raw := c.Query("token")
	if !safeToken.MatchString(raw) {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "invalid"})
		return
	}
	decoded, err := url.QueryUnescape(raw)
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "invalid"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"token": strings.ToLower(decoded)})
}
